transcript: Speaker A (Rani): ओ, तू पण इथेच? [Oh, you too here?] Speaker B (Akash): हो. [Yes.] Speaker A (Rani): तू पुण्यावरून बोलतेस म्हणून विचारलं. [I asked because you are speaking from Pune.] Speaker B (Akash): बरोबर, मग इथे किती दिवसांपासून आहेस? [Right, so how many days have you been here?] Speaker A (Rani): आज तिसरा दिवस आहे. [Today is the third day.] Speaker B (Akash): पण तरीही चांगलं बोलतेस इंग्लिश. [But still you speak English well.] Speaker A (Rani): कारण इथे रोज बोलायची सवय लागते, मज्जा पण येते. [Because here you get the habit of speaking daily, and it's fun too.] Speaker B (Akash): हो, इंग्लिश क्लासेस पेक्षा जास्त युजफुल वाटतंय. [Yes, it feels more useful than English classes.] Speaker C (Voiceover): MySivi ॲपवर १ कोटी लोक स्पोकन इंग्लिशची प्रॅक्टिस करतात. तुम्ही पण आजच सुरू करा. ट्रायल फक्त १ रुपयात. [Over 1 crore people practice spoken English on MySivi app. You too start today. Trial for just 1 rupee.]
on_screen_text: Be polite and respect the other person's opinion. Avoid rude comments. Rani, Akash. practices for an average of 6 minutes/call. 28:12 minutes remaining for today's call. Call may be recorded to ensure a quality experience. Mute, Speaker, End. Start English Learning - MySivi. 10M+ Downloads. Install. MySivi Premium. LIMITED TIME OFFER. ₹1. Autopay, cancel anytime. 1,200 learners purchased today. 24/7 AI English Teacher. 500+ Exercises and Lessons. Unlimited Access.
summary: The ad features a simulated conversation between two users practicing English on the MySivi app, highlighting how daily practice builds confidence quickly. It showcases the app's interface, download popularity, and concludes with a promotional offer of a trial for just 1 rupee.
